overall.description: A first-person flight through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, piloting a flying vehicle (AV) through narrow urban canyons between neon-lit skyscrapers during a rainy night. The journey begins navigating past traditional Japanese architecture mixed with futuristic buildings, transitions through dense skyscraper corridors, and concludes with a landing on platform 09.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban canyon with traditional Japanese architecture

events.description: beginning flight through narrow urban canyon with mixed traditional and futuristic architecture
banking right to navigate around traditional building structure with curved roofs

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through narrow corridors between skyscrapers, navigating past holographic advertisements and traditional architecture

entered.detail: multi-tiered building with curved black roofs and teal illuminated windows
tall vertical holographic display showing a human figure in cyan and white
modern glass facade building with grid pattern and interior lighting
exposed metal beams and industrial piping on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The flight begins through a narrow urban canyon in a futuristic city at night. A distinctive traditional Japanese building with curved roofs dominates the right side, while towering holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers line the flight path. The vehicle banks right to navigate around the traditional structure as rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense futuristic skyscraper canyon with industrial elements

events.description: entering tighter corridor between modern glass skyscrapers with reduced clearance
passing large illuminated pink billboard with 'wide open' text and product imagery

agents.ego_description: navigating through extremely tight spaces between high-rise buildings, making sharp turns to avoid obstacles while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with pink background displaying 'wide open' text and product advertisements
tall industrial building with large illuminated '09' sign on the facade, serving as destination
metal platform with railings and equipment on building rooftop

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a tighter canyon between modern skyscrapers, passing a large pink 'wide open' billboard. Building 09 with its illuminated signage becomes visible in the distance as the destination. The traditional architecture and initial holographic billboards pass out of view as the flight continues through the dense urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop level with industrial ventilation and circular neon structures

events.description: emerging from narrow canyon to open rooftop level with industrial installations
rain becomes visibly heavier, creating atmospheric haze and visible rain streaks
banking left around large circular structure with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: flying over building rooftops at reduced altitude, maneuvering around industrial installations and ventilation systems

notable_agents.action: blue flying vehicle (AV) moving through the city in the distance, traveling parallel to ego's path

entered.detail: large cylindrical structure wrapped in red neon lights with a circular platform on top
industrial ventilation units and exhaust structures on building rooftops
blue holographic projection visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the narrow canyon to fly over building rooftops, revealing a large circular structure with prominent red neon lighting on the left. Heavy rain creates atmospheric haze as the vehicle banks left around obstacles. Another flying vehicle appears in the distance, and industrial rooftop ventilation systems fill the lower portion of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown airspace with dense skyscraper cluster and heavy signage

events.description: entering open airspace between skyscraper clusters with improved visibility
navigating past other flying vehicles in the aerial traffic lane
turning toward building 09 landing pad, aligning for final approach

agents.ego_description: flying through open city airspace at high speed, navigating between towering skyscrapers with heavy neon signage and other aerial traffic

notable_agents.action: blue flying vehicle (AV) traveling in same direction through the city canyon, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall building with repeating yellow 'K12' signage illuminated on the facade
large holographic display showing 'FOURTH WALL' text and entertainment content
vertical billboard with 'TECHNOLOGIES' text and 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' advertisement

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters open airspace between dense clusters of skyscrapers, with the K12 building dominating the right side. Multiple holographic billboards including 'FOURTH WALL' and 'TECHNOLOGIES' illuminate the scene. Building 09 reappears as the clear destination, and the vehicle aligns for final approach while navigating around other flying vehicles in the traffic lane.

events.description: beginning vertical descent onto landing platform 09, reducing forward speed
entering sheltered landing area surrounded by high building walls on rooftop
touching down on landing pad and coming to a complete stop

agents.ego_description: descending vertically onto landing platform 09, aligning with the pad markings while heavy rain obscures visibility, then touching down gently

entered.detail: illuminated landing platform with '09' markings and hazard lights on the rooftop of the building
tall enclosing walls of the landing area creating a sheltered pocket
tall enclosing walls of the landing area creating a sheltered pocket

segments.scene_description: The vehicle begins its final descent onto landing platform 09, surrounded by the enclosing walls of the rooftop landing area. Heavy rain continues to fall as the vehicle aligns with the illuminated pad markings. The surrounding skyscrapers and billboards pass out of view, replaced by the close walls of the landing pocket, before the vehicle touches down and comes to a stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight through a rain-slicked neon metropolis, transitioning from narrow urban canyons into open airspace before concluding with a precise rooftop landing. It begins by banking around a traditional Japanese building with curved roofs, moving past towering holographic billboards as rain starts to fall. As the vehicle enters a tighter corridor of modern skyscrapers, the traditional architecture fades away, replaced by a large pink billboard and the distant glow of Building 09. The scene then expands over industrial rooftops and a large circular red neon structure, navigating through atmospheric haze and traffic before aligning with the K12 building and various corporate holograms. Finally, the camera descends from the open sky into the enclosing walls of a rooftop landing pocket, where the surrounding city disappears as the vehicle touches down on the illuminated markings of platform 09.
